profile.text: Master in Computer Systems graduated from the Instituto Tecnológico Superior de Teziutlán with a specialty in software development and Mechatronics Engineer with a specialty in process automation. I am responsible, active, dynamic, honest, and have a good attitude towards teamwork. As I understand the sense of urgency, I have the ability to work under pressure. I enjoy web development, making me self-taught in the area, and I find it easy to learn new technologies.
